Artera Token

Buy Artera

Artera Token

Buy Artera

The value of all artistic expression represented by a common unit.

Artera Token is an open source, decentralized token that tracks the art market, enabling artistic value to be monetized through a cryptocurrency. Artera is an ERC-20 token built on Ethereum, to ensure its long-term stability, transparency and acceptance as a store of wealth and means of exchange.

Buy ArteraHow to buy Artera >Read Artera White Paper >

One small coin, an industry revolution

While the world of art is being disrupted by new forms of decentralized ownership, through digital auctions, securitizing of art works as shares, and non-fungible tokens (NFTs), the valuation of art as well as artists and creators remains mired in rather rigid social structures and traditional mindsets.

Exclusivity, limiting access, preventing the sharing of information, and hoarding, remains the norm.

None of which helps in overcoming the serious drawbacks to promoting, financing, and growing artistic enterprise as a $2.1T wealth asset class comparable to bonds, stocks, real estate, gold or oil.

The team that created Artera set out to solve this problem. To do so, we created a decentralized token that could unite the many tribes that compose the art community.

Featured Artists

Sheila Pye

Sheila was born in Canada in 1978 and studied painting and photography before doing her Master’s Degree in film production. As a writer and director she has completed 9 award winning short films as well as maintaining an active art practice working in photography and video art. Her work has been exhibited internationally and collected in prestigious museums such as the Smithsonian Institute. She has also undertook a residency at the Canadian Film Centre in the director's lab. Sheila currently lives and works in Madrid.In 2018 Sheila founded the production company Luna1 dedicated to producing female driven projects. www.luna1.es

Katy Alexander

Katy is a London-based artist who specialises in drawn collages of a satirical nature. Her vibrantly coloured creations draw the eye into a labyrinth of stories, images, and phrases that document world events and the chaotic nature of the human condition. Katy’s early exposure to art created a curiosity to explore and experiment with different mediums, from paint to sculpture. She's found her niche in collage-like illustrations, where her interests in various media come together. Katy enjoys when people zoom into her art and find hidden layers of meaning in the drawings, creating a process of discovery and exploration between the viewer and her artwork.

Teclana

A small, but diverse, group of artists in Chicago and Madrid who design art for the benefit of all sentient beings.
Teclana has individually produced over 16,000 pieces and is distributing their work through NFT channels and designate royalties to organizations who support the well being of sentient beings.

PreviousNext

How to buy Artera

Artera Coin is listed on Uniswap

Artera Token is listed on Uniswap

1.

Create MetaMask wallet

Create a MetaMask Wallet using either a desktop computer or an iOS/Android mobile device. That will allow you to buy, sell, send, and receive ARTERA.

Download Metamask
Install Metamask
Metamask Settings
Connect Hardware Wallet
Gas Fee
Cancel a transaction
Download Metamask

2.

Send ETH to your wallet

You can buy Ethereum (ETH) directly on MetaMask or transfer it to your MetaMask Wallet from exchanges like Coinbase, Binance, etc. Make sure to use the ERC-20 network when transferring ETH.

Buy Ethereum using Metamask

3.

Connect your wallet to UniSwap

Access your wallet to UniSwap by clicking ‘Connect to a wallet’ and selecting MetaMask.

4.

Swap ETH for ARTERA

You can start swapping as soon as you have ETH available! Press ‘Select a token’ and enter the token address or search for it on the tokens list.

Buy Artera

How to buy Artera

Artera will soon be listed on uniswap.Until then, buy Artera on OpenSea

Artera Token is listed Opensea

1.

Create MetaMask wallet

Create a MetaMask Wallet using either a desktop computer or an iOS/Android mobile device. That will allow you to buy, sell, send, and receive ARTERA.

Download Metamask
Install Metamask
Metamask Settings
Connect Hardware Wallet
Gas Fee
Cancel a transaction
Download Metamask

2.

Send ETH to your wallet

You can buy Ethereum (ETH) directly on MetaMask or transfer it to your MetaMask Wallet from exchanges like Coinbase, Binance, etc. Make sure to use the ERC-20 network when transferring ETH.

Buy Ethereum using Metamask

3.

Connect your wallet to Opensea

Access your wallet to Opensea by clicking ‘Connect to a wallet’ and selecting MetaMask.

4.

Swap ETH for ARTERA

You can start swapping as soon as you have ETH available! Press ‘Select a token’ and enter the token address or search for it on the tokens list.
